objects.query: SELECT Id, Name, Email__c, Phone__c, Logo_Url__c, Instagram_Url__c, Facebook_Url__c, Website__c, Description__c FROM AA_Business__c
SELECT Id, Name, Address__c, Business__c, Display_Name__c FROM AA_Business_Branch__c
SELECT Id, Name, Business_Branch__c, Description_Short__c, Display_Name__c, Is_Active__c FROM AA_Service_Category__c

SELECT Id, Name, AA_Service_Category__c, Business_Branch__c, Count_Appointments_Done__c, Description__c, Display_Name__c, Duration_Minutes__c, Is_Active__c, Price__c, Requires_Manual_Coordination__c FROM AA_Service__c
SELECT Id, Name, Available_In_Public_Agenda__c, Business_Branch__c, Color__c, First_Name__c, Is_Active__c, Last_Name__c, User__c FROM AA_Employee__c
SELECT Id, Name, Business_Branch__c, Date__c FROM AA_Branch_Holiday__c
SELECT Id, Name, Admin_Close_Time__c, Admin_Open_Time__c, Business_Branch__c, Close_Time__c, Day_Of_Week__c, Open_Time__c FROM AA_Branch_Working_Hour__c
SELECT Id, Name, Day_Of_Week__c, Employee__c, End_Default_Break_Hour__c, End_Hour__c, Start_Default_Break_Hour__c, Start_Hour__c FROM AA_Employee_Working_Hour__c
SELECT Id, Name, Employee__c, Service__c FROM AA_Employee_Service__c

SELECT Id, Name, Business_Name__c, Business__c, Comments_From_Customer__c, Count_Appointments_Done__c, Email__c, First_Name__c, Has_Allergies__c, Internal_Comments__c, Is_New_Customer__c, Last_Name__c, Phone_Number__c FROM AA_Customer__c
SELECT Id, Name, Category__c, Day_Of_Week__c, Employee__c, End_Date_Time__c, Start_Date_Time__c FROM AA_Employee_Absence__c

SELECT Id, Name, Amount__c, Book_Confirmation_Sent_Date__c, Branch_Name__c, Business_Id__c, Business_Name__c, Cancelled_Date__c, Customer_Comments__c, Customer_Confirmation_Date__c, Customer__c, Done_Date__c, Duration_Minutes__c, Employee__c, End_Date_Time__c, Internal_Comments__c, Is_Book_Confirmation_Sent__c, Is_Customer_Confirmed__c, Is_Paid__c, Is_Payment_Pending__c, Is_Reminder_Sent__c, Payment_Amount__c, Payment_Date__c, Payment_Method__c, Reminder_Sent_Date__c, Service__c, Start_Date_Time__c, Status__c FROM AA_Appointment__c
